Tunda kowane ƙasa tana da yanayinta, abubuwan da ke haɓaka, abubuwan da ke hana, da kuma mahimman ayyukan da za a yi suna bambanta; ayyakar da aka gabatar a wannan rahoton, tare da amsa daga kasashe 105 na WHO, ya tabbatar da wannan bambancin.  Alalokacin haka, an lura cewa an samar da kudin da za a sha (Morphine) da sauran opioids masu ƙarfi a asibitai da kuma cibiyoyin lafiya ba bisa ƙidaya ba, sakamakon ƙarancin kudi, a ƙasashen da ke da matsala da kuma matsakaicin kudin da za a sha (income) a kwance, idan aka kwatanta da ƙasashen da ke da kudin da za a sha (income) mai yawa.  Fiye da kashi uku na wadanda suka amsa sun lura da abubuwan da ke hana sakamakon dokoki da ƙa'idoji, yayin da suke girmama mahimmancin dokokin da ke hana a samu abubuwa da yawa a samu hanyar samun kudin da za a sha (Morphine) da amincin lafiya.  Ƙaƙƙarfan buƙatu na iya hana samun lafiya ga marasa lafiya saboda yana hana samar da kayan aiki ko ya sa a samu wahala ga jami'an lafiya a rubuta da rarraba kudin da za a sha (Morphine).  Ya zama mai mahimmanci a lura da damuwar da ake yi da yuwuwar cutar da kudin da za a sha (Morphine) na iya haifar da ita, kamar yuwuwar haifar da cutar da kudin da za a sha (opioid use disorder).  Don wannan dalili, ya zama mai mahimmanci a yi takaici game da yuwuwar cutar da kudin da za a sha (opioid) (misali, amfanin sa a cikin cutar da ba sa da cutar kansar).  Muna buƙatar kula da lafiya kamar yadda amfanin sa ya kasance da ilimi da kuma yawanin hada-hadar da haɗari.  Ir wannan damuwa ba ta cancanci ɓatar da amfanin kudin da za a sha (opioid) lokacin da ya cancanta a gane shi kuma lokacin da aka amshi shi da amincin lafiya ta hanyar ƙwararrun jami'an lafiya.  Abubuwan da za a yi:  Rahoton ya gabatar da jerin abubuwan da za a yi don inganta samun kudin da za a sha (Morphine) da amincin lafiya.

**Transliteration (approximate):**

"Dalilan bambancin samun kudin da za a sha (Morphine) don amfanin lafiya yana danganta da abubuwa da dama waɗanda ke tasiri juna, gami da abubuwan da ke haɓaka da kuma tsarin mulki mai kyau, tsarin sayayya da samar da kayan aiki mai amsa da kuma ƙarfi, samun isasshen kudi da ƙarfi, da kuma ayyukan ƙirƙirar ƙarfi. Kuma akwai abubuwan da ke hana, kamar dokokin da ke hana a samu abubuwa da yawa, ƙaƙƙarfan aiki, da kuma ra'ayoyi da fahimmar da ba su daidai. Tunda kowane ƙasa tana da yanayinta, abubuwan da ke haɓaka, abubuwan da ke hana, da kuma mahimman ayyukan da za a yi suna bambanta; ayyakar da aka gabatar a wannan rahoton, tare da amsa daga kasashe 105 na WHO, ya tabbatar da wannan bambancin. Alalokacin haka, an lura cewa an samar da kudin da za a sha (Morphine) da sauran opioids masu ƙarfi a asibitai da kuma cibiyoyin lafiya ba bisa ƙidaya ba, sakamakon ƙarancin kudi, a ƙasashen da ke da matsala da kuma matsakaicin kudin da za a sha (income) a kwance, idan aka kwatanta da ƙasashen da ke da kudin da za a sha (income) mai yawa. Fiye da kashi uku na wadanda suka amsa sun lura da abubuwan da ke hana sakamakon dokoki da ƙa'idoji, yayin da suke girmama mahimmancin dokokin da ke hana a samu abubuwa da yawa a samu hanyar samun kudin da za a sha (Morphine) da amincin lafiya. Ƙaƙƙarfan buƙatu na iya hana samun lafiya ga marasa lafiya saboda yana hana samar da kayan aiki ko ya sa a samu wahala ga jami'an lafiya a rubuta da rarraba kudin da za a sha (Morphine). Ya zama mai mahimmanci a lura da damuwar da ake yi da yuwuwar cutar da kudin da za a sha (Morphine) na iya haifar da ita, kamar yuwuwar haifar da cutar da kudin da za a sha (opioid use disorder). Don wannan dalili, ya zama mai mahimmanci a yi takaici game da yuwuwar cutar da kudin da za a sha (opioid) (misali, amfanin sa a cikin cutar da ba sa da cutar kansar). Muna buƙatar kula da lafiya kamar yadda amfanin sa ya kasance da ilimi da kuma yawanin hada-hadar da haɗari. Ir wannan damuwa ba ta cancanci ɓatar da amfanin kudin da za a sha (opioid) lokacin da ya cancanta a gane shi kuma lokacin da aka amshi shi da amincin lafiya ta hanyar ƙwararrun jami'an lafiya. Abubuwan da za a yi: Rahoton ya gabatar da jerin abubuwan da za a yi don inganta samun kudin da za a sha (Morphine) da amincin lafiya."

**Explanation of Choices and Nuances:**

*   **Morphine:** I've consistently used "kudin da za a sha (Morphine)" to ensure clarity.  Using the English word in parentheses helps readers familiar with the term.
*   **Opioids:** Similarly, "opioids masu ƙarfi" is used.

*   **High-Income Countries:** Translated as "ƙasashen da ke da kudin da za a sha (income) mai yawa" which means "countries with high income."
*   **Safe Access:** "Samun...da amincin lafiya" is used consistently to convey "safe access."
*   **Stakeholder Survey:** "Ayyakar da aka gabatar a wannan rahoton, tare da amsa daga kasashe..." - This phrasing is used to accurately represent the survey context.
*   **Harmful Effects/Opioid Use Disorder:** I've tried to use clear and understandable language to describe these concepts, keeping in mind the target audience.
*   **Proportionate to Risks:** "Yawanin hada-hadar da haɗari" attempts to capture the meaning of "proportionate to risks" in a way that is accessible.
*   **Flow of Supply:** "Samar da kayan aiki" is used to represent the flow of supply.

**Important Considerations:**

*   **Hausa Dialects:** Hausa has regional dialects. This translation aims for a generally understandable form.

translations.source: These include implementing small-scale regional or state-wide programmes on improving access to morphine for medical use with a package of essential services and products for palliative care that is formulated according to the WHO Model List of Essential Medicines and the WHO Essential Package of Palliative Care. They also include improving governance, streamlining procurement and supply processes to address any inefficiency, improving resourcing such as stable funding, enhancing competent skill sets of the health workforce, and raising awareness about both the benefits and potential harms of opioid use. The success of these actions will hinge on collaboration and cooperation among all stakeholders at national, regional, and global levels.
translations.reference: Waɗannan sun haɗa da aiwatar da ƙananan shirye-shirye na yankuna da na jihohi kan haɓaka damar yin amfani da morphine wajen kiwon lafiya tare da mahimman ayyuka da kayayyaki don kulawa da jin daɗi, wanda aka tsara akan Jerin Kayayyakin WHO na Mahimman Magunguna da Muhimman Ƙunshin Lafiya na Kulawar WHO. Har ila yau, sun haɗa da inganta tsarin mulki, daidaita sayayya da hanyoyin samar da kayayyaki don magance duk wani tasgaro, inganta kayan aiki kamar samar da kuɗaɗe, samar da ƙwarewa a ma'aikatar kiwon lafiya, da wayar da kan jama'a game da fa'idodi da illar amfani da opioid. Nasarar waɗannan ayyukan za ta ta'allaƙa ne kan haɗin gwiwa da haɗin kai tsakanin dukkan masu ruwa da tsaki a matakan ƙasa, yanki da duniya baki ɗaya.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's a translation of the provided English text into Hausa, aiming for clarity and accuracy suitable for a low-resource language context. I've included explanations after the translation to justify some choices and highlight potential areas for further refinement.

**Hausa Translation:**

"Waɗannan abubuwan sun haɗa da aiwatar da ƙananan shirye-shiryen a matakin lardin ko jihar don bunkasar hanyoyin samun morphine don amfanin liki, tare da kunshin ayyukan da samfuran da ake buƙata don kula da marasa lafiya (palliative care). Kunnshin ya kamata a shirya bisa ga Jerin Kayayyakin Likaman da ake Buƙata na WHO (WHO Model List of Essential Medicines) da kuma Kayan Aikin Palliative Care na WHO.  Har ila yawa, ya haɗa da bunkasar tsarin mulki, da sassaka tsarin siye da samar da abubuwa don kawar da duk wata rashayarsa, bunkasar kariya ta hanyar kafa kudi mai dacewa, ƙara ƙwarewar ƙwararrun ma'aikatan lafiya, da kuma ƙara wayar da hankali game da amsa da kuma haɗarin amfani da opioids. Nasarar waɗannan ayyukan za ta dogara ne akan hadin gwiwa da taimakon juna a tsakanin dukkanin wadanda ke da cancantar yin alkawari a matakin kasa, lardin, da duniya baki daya."

**Explanation of Choices and Considerations:**

*   **"Waɗannan abubuwan sun haɗa da..."** - "These include..." - A standard and clear way to introduce a list.
*   **"aiwatar da ƙananan shirye-shiryen..."** - "implementing small-scale programmes..." -  "Aiwaatar da" means "to implement." "Ƙananan" means "small."
*   **"a matakin lardin ko jihar..."** - "at the regional or state level..." - "Matakin" means "level." "Lardin" is "region" and "jihar" is "state."
*   **"bunkasar hanyoyin samun morphine..."** - "improving access to morphine..." - "Bunkasar" means "to improve" or "to enhance." "Hanyoyin samun" means "ways of getting/accessing."
*   **"don amfanin liki..."** - "for medical use..." - "Amfanin liki" means "medical use."
*   **"tare da kunshin ayyukan da samfuran da ake buƙata..."** - "with a package of essential services and products..." -  This is a more literal translation to ensure clarity. "Kunshin" means "package." "Ayyukan" means "services." "Samfuran" means "products." "Da ake buƙata" means "essential."
*   **"kula da marasa lafiya (palliative care)"** - "palliative care" - I've included "palliative care" in parentheses to provide the English term for clarity, as the concept might be new to some readers.
*   **"bisa ga..."** - "according to..." - A standard phrase for indicating adherence to a standard.
*   **"Jerin Kayayyakin Likaman da ake Buƙata na WHO..."** - "WHO Model List of Essential Medicines" - I've translated this as "List of Essential Medicines Required by WHO."  It's a more descriptive translation.
*   **"Kayan Aikin Palliative Care na WHO"** - "WHO Essential Package of Palliative Care" - Translated as "Tools/Materials for Palliative Care of WHO."
*   **"Har ila yawa..."** - "They also include..." - A good transition phrase.
*   **"bunkasar tsarin mulki..."** - "improving governance..." - "Tsarin mulki" means "governance/system of government."
*   **"sassaka tsarin siye da samar da abubuwa..."** - "streamlining procurement and supply processes..." - "Sassaka" means "to streamline." "Siyen" means "procurement." "Samar da abubuwa" means "supply of goods."
*   **"don kawar da duk wata rashayarsa..."** - "to address any inefficiency..." - "Kawar da" means "to address/remove." "Rashayarsa" means "inefficiency."
*   **"bunkasar kariya ta hanyar kafa kudi mai dacewa..."** - "improving resourcing such as stable funding..." - "Kariya" means "resourcing/funding." "Kafa kudi" means "establishing funding." "Mai dacewa" means "stable/appropriate."
*   **"ƙara ƙwarewar ƙwararrun ma'aikatan lafiya..."** - "enhancing competent skill sets of the health workforce..." - "Ƙara" means "to increase/enhance." "Ƙwarewa" means "expertise/skill." "Ƙwararrun ma'aikatan lafiya" means "competent health workers."
*   **"da kuma ƙara wayar da hankali..."** - "and raising awareness..." - "Wayar da hankali" means "raising awareness."
*   **"game da amsa da kuma haɗarin amfani da opioids..."** - "about both the benefits and potential harms of opioid use..." - "Amsa" means "benefits." "Haɗarin" means "harm/risk."
*   **"Nasarar waɗannan ayyukan za ta dogara ne akan..."** - "The success of these actions will hinge on..." - "Dogara ne akan" means "will depend on."
*   **"hadin gwiwa da taimakon juna..."** - "collaboration and cooperation..." - "Hadin gwiwa" means "collaboration." "Taimakon juna" means "cooperation/helping each other."
*   **"a tsakanin dukkanin wadanda ke da cancantar yin alkawari..."** - "among all stakeholders..." - "Wadanda ke da cancantar yin alkawari" means "those who have the right/ability to make commitments/stakeholders."
*   **"a matakin kasa, lardin, da duniya baki daya."** - "at national, regional, and global levels." - "Kasa" means "national." "Duniya baki daya" means "the whole world/global."

**Important Notes for Low-Resource Languages:**

translations.source: Small islands agree bold plan of action on noncommunicable diseases and mental health Today, the 2023 Bridgetown Declaration on Noncommunicable Diseases (NCDs) and Mental Health was launched, to address some of the world’s deadliest diseases in Small Island Developing States (SIDS), which are especially at risk. The Declaration is a key outcome of the SIDS Ministerial Conference on Noncommunicable Diseases (NCDs) and Mental Health, running from 14 to 16 June, co-hosted by the World Health Organization (WHO), the Pan American Health Organization (PAHO) and the Government of Barbados. SIDS are disproportionately impacted by NCDs – which cause 74% of all deaths globally – due to their reliance on imported food, commercial influences and the climate crisis. A new WHO report shows that 8 of the 15 countries with more than a 30% risk of premature death from cardiovascular disease, cancer, diabetes, or chronic respiratory disease are SIDS. The 10 countries with the highest obesity rates globally are all SIDS in the Pacific, where over 45% of adults live with obesity. Mental health conditions are common in SIDS countries, affecting an estimated 15.2% of the population in the Caribbean and 11.2% of the population in the Pacific. People with mental health conditions face a higher risk of premature mortality, including from unaddressed physical health conditions and from suicide. Stigma, specialized staff shortages and the impact of climate change contribute to a challenging situation in SIDS that requires immediate attention. The 2023 Bridgetown Declaration outlines bold steps to address the range of social, environmental, economic and commercial issues that lead to NCDs and mental health conditions.
translations.reference: Ƙananan tsibirai sun amince kan babban shirin ayyuka kan cututtukan da ba sa yaɗuwa da cututtukan ƙwaƙwalwa. A yau, an ƙaddamar da sanarwar Bridgetown na 2023 akan Cututtukan da ba sa yaɗuwa (NCDs) da Lafiyar Ƙwaƙwalwa, don magance wasu cututtukan masu tsanani a duniya a cikin Ƙananan Tsibirai masu tasowa (SIDS), musamman waɗanda ke cikin haɗari. Sanarwar ita ce mahimmiyar sakamako na taron ministocin SIDS kan cututtukan da ba sa yaɗuwa (NCDs) da lafiyar ƙwaƙwalwa, wanda ke gudana daga ranar 14 zuwa 16 ga Yuni, wanda Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO), da kuma Pan American Health Organisation (PAHO) suka shirya. Gwamnatin Barbados. NCDs na da matuƙar tasiri ga SIDS, wanda hakan ke haifar da kashi 74% na duk mace-mace a duniya saboda dogaro da abincin da ake shigowa da su daga waje, tasirin kasuwanci da kuma rikicewar yanayi. Wani sabon rahoton na WHO ya bayyana cewa 8 daga cikin ƙasashe 15 da ke da fiye da kashi 30 cikin dari na haɗarin mutuwa da wuri daga cututtukan zuciya, ciwon daji, ciwon sukari, ko cututtukan numfashi na yau da kullun sune SID. Ƙasashe 10 da ke da mafiya yawan masu fama da cutar ƙiba a duniya duk SID ne a cikin Pasifik, inda sama da kashi 45% na manya ke rayuwa da cutar ƙiba. Matsalolin lafiyar ƙwaƙwalwa ya zama ruwan dare a cikin ƙasashen SIDS, wanda ya shafi kimanin kashi 15.2 na yawan jama'ar Caribbean da kashi 11.2 na yawan jama'ar Pasifik. Mutanen da ke fama da matsalar lafiyar ƙwaƙwalwa suna fuskantar haɗarin mutuwa da wuri, rashin samun isasshen kulawa ta lafiyar jiki gami da kuma yunkurin kashe kawunansu. Abin kunya, ƙarancin ƙwararrun ma'aikata da tasirin sauyin yanayi suna ba da gudummawa wajen fuskantar ƙalubale a cikin SIDS wanda ke buƙatar kulawa da gaggawa. Sanarwar Bridgetown ta 2023 ta zayyana ƙwararan matakai don magance matsalolin zamantakewa, muhalli, tattalin arziki da kasuwanci waɗanda ke haifar da NCDs da yanayin lafiyar hankali.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's the Hausa translation of the provided document. I've aimed for clarity and accuracy, keeping in mind the context of health and international agreements.  I've also included some notes after the translation to explain some choices I made.

**Translation (Hausa):**

**Isarar Tsaka-tsakin Kananan Tsibirin Kan gaba da Tsarin Aiki Mai Karfi kan Cututtukan Ba Sauniyarwa da Lafiya ta Zikiri**

A yau, An gabatar da Sanarwar Bridgetown ta 2023 kan Cututtukan Ba Sauniyarwa (NCDs) da Lafiya ta Zikiri, don warware wasu matsalar cututtuka mafi kashe mutane a duniya a cikin Jihohin Tsibirin da Kula da Kula (SIDS), waɗanda ke cikin haɗarin musammam. Sanarwar wacce ta fi kwanan wata ce ta taron ministocin SIDS kan Cututtukan Ba Sauniyarwa (NCDs) da Lafiya ta Zikiri, da ya gudana daga 14 zuwa 16 ga Yuni, wanda kungiyar lafiya ta duniya (WHO), Kungiyar Amurka ta Amurka don Lafiya (PAHO) da gwamnatin Barbados suka shirya tare.

An yi yawa SIDS ta shiga cikin cututtukan ba sauniyarwa – waɗanda ke haifar da kashi 74% na mutuwar mutane a duniya – saboda dogaro da abinci mai shigo da shi, tasiri kasuwanci da rikici na yanayi. Sabon rahoton WHO ya nuna cewa, daga cikin kasashe 15 da ke da ƙarancin 30% haɗarin mutuwar da ba sa daɗa daga cutar zuciya, kansar, sukari ko cutar numfashi mai tsanani, SIDS ne su goma. Kasashe goma da ke da mafi yawan matsalar jikata a duniya, duk SIDS ne a Pacific, inda sama da kashi 45% na manya suna rayuwa da jikata.

Matsalolin lafiyar zuciya sun shude a kasashe SIDS, waɗanda ke shafar kimaɗa mutane kimanin 15.2% a Caribbean da 11.2% a Pacific. Mutanen da ke da matsalar lafiyar zuciya suna facin haɗarin mutuwar da ba sa daɗa, gami da matsalolin lafiya na jiki da ba a warware ba da kasala. Tsoma baki, kawuna na ma'aikata na musamman da tasirin canjin yanayi ke haɗa yanayin da ke da ƙalubale a cikin SIDS wanda ya buƙaci kulawa nan ba da daɗa.

Sanarwar Bridgetown ta 2023 ta bayyana matakan da suka fi dadi don warware jigon matsalar zamantauwa, muhittaci, tattalin arziki da kasuwanci waɗanda ke haifar da cututtukan ba sauniyarwa da matsalar lafiyar zuciya.

---

**Notes on Translation Choices:**

*   **NCDs:** I've used the abbreviation "NCDs" as it's becoming increasingly common even in Hausa discussions of health topics. I also provided the full translation "Cututtukan Ba Sauniyarwa" for clarity.
*   **SIDS:** Similar to NCDs, I've kept the abbreviation "SIDS" and provided the full translation "Jihohin Tsibirin da Kula da Kula" (Island Developing States).
*   **"Bold Plan of Action":** Translated as "Tsarin Aiki Mai Karfi" - emphasizing the strength and importance of the plan.
*   **"Premature Mortality":** Translated as "mutuwar da ba sa daɗa" - meaning "premature death."
*   **"Stigma":** Translated as "Tsoma baki" - the standard Hausa term for stigma.
*   **Climate Crisis:** Translated as "rikici na yanayi" - a direct and understandable translation.
*   **Word Choice:** I tried to use relatively common and accessible Hausa vocabulary, avoiding overly technical terms where possible.
*   **Sentence Structure:** I adjusted sentence structure slightly to flow more naturally in Hausa.  Direct, word-for-word translations can often sound awkward.

**Important Considerations:**

*   **Context is Key:** This translation is based on the provided text. If there's a specific audience or purpose for the translation, further adjustments might be needed.
*   **Review by a Native Speaker:** Ideally, a native Hausa speaker with experience in health or international relations should review the translation for accuracy and cultural appropriateness.
*   **Dialect:** Hausa has different dialects. This translation aims for a generally understandable form, but a specific dialect might require some modifications.



I hope this translation is helpful! Let me know if you have any other questions or need further refinements.

translations.source: Developed through an inclusive process led ‘for’ and ‘by’ SIDS, the declaration highlights that NCDs and mental health conditions cannot be properly addressed without responding to the climate crisis. “Bold action for our climate, good health, and well-being relies on redressing and reorganizing global financing to unlock billions in investment, while making it less punishing for developing countries to pay their debts,” said Her Excellency Mia Amor Mottley, Prime Minister of Barbados. “Funding for climate change adaptation and mitigation in the most vulnerable countries is also key, with noncommunicable diseases and mental health accounted for.” "The challenges faced by Small Island Developing States are interconnected and multifaceted. Climate change, environmental degradation, social and economic inequalities, and the commercial determinants of health exacerbate the burden of NCDs and mental health conditions," said Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, WHO Director-General. "Despite their limited resources and geographical constraints, these nations have shown remarkable resilience in the face of adversity. Together, we must forge a path that is based on equity, resilience, and sustainability. We must strengthen health systems, enhance prevention and early detection measures, and prioritize the integration of NCD and mental health services into primary health care. "The Director-General also pledged that WHO would work to mobilize financial resources to develop climate resilient, environmentally sustainable health-care facilities in the SIDS. WHO will also continue to advocate for ‘loss and damage’ funding for climate change adaptation and mitigation investments in lower income countries.
translations.reference: Ta hanyar gamammiyar tsari da SID ta jagoranta, sanarwar ta nuna cewa ba za a iya magance NCDs da matsalolin lafiyar ƙwaƙwalwa yadda ya kamata ba, ba tare da magance rikicin yanayi ba. Ɗaukan ƙwararan matakai da suka dace a game da yanayi, lafiya da kuma walwalarmu, ya dogara ne kan gyaran tsarin tafiyar da kuɗaɗe a duniya, don samar da biliyoyin hanyoyin zuba hannun jari, da rage wa ƙasashe masu tasowa nauyin biyan basussukan da ake bin su. Firayim Ministan Barbados. Bayar da kuɗi ga ƙasashe masu rauni don daidaitawa da sauyin yanayi abu ne mai muhimmanci, tare da ƙididdige cututtuka marasa yaɗuwa da lafiyar ƙwaƙwalwa. Ƙalubalen da Jihohin masu tasowa a Kananan Tsibirai ke fuskanta, suna da alaƙa da juna, da fuskoki daban-daban. Sauyin yanayi, lalacewar muhalli, rashin daidaiton zamantakewa da tattalin arziki, da kuma hanyoyin kasuwanci na kiwon lafiya suna ƙara tsananta nauyin NCDs da yanayin lafiyar ƙwaƙwalwa," in ji Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus, Darakta-Janar na WHO. Duk da ƙarancin albarkatun da suke da shi da kuma matsalar yanki, wadannan al’ummomi sun nuna matukar jajircewa wajen fuskantar matsaloli. Tare, dole ne mu samar da hanyar da ta ginu akan daidaito, juriya, da ɗorewa. Dole ne mu ƙarfafa tsarin kiwon lafiya, haɓaka matakan kariya da ganowa da wuri, da kuma ba da fifiko ga haɗin gwiwar NCD da ayyukan kula da lafiyar ƙwaƙwalwa a cikin kiwon lafiya na farko. Darakta-Janar ɗin ya kuma yi alƙawarin cewa WHO za ta yi aiki don tattara kuɗaɗe don bunƙasa yanayin juriya, wuraren kula da lafiya masu ɗorewa a cikin SIDS. WHO za ta kuma ci gaba da bayar da shawarwari don samar da kuɗaɗe na asara da lalacewa don daidaita canjin yanayi da rage saka hannun jari a ƙasashe masu ƙaramin karfi.

translations.source: As part of agreeing the Declaration, SIDS signed up to undertake a suite of actions, covering areas such as engaging all of society, accelerating implementation, securing investments, aligning across governments and accounting for progress. The conference also showcased specific commitments by SIDS on NCDs and mental health, including to improve access to mental health care in primary care facilities, update tobacco control legislation to cover e-cigarettes and vaping, and reduce populations’ salt and sugar intake. These commitments align with WHO’s ‘best buys’ – a set of cost-effective, evidence-based interventions to tackle NCDs. The list of best buys was recently updated at the World Health Assembly in May to include secondary prevention for rheumatic fever, acute and long-term management of asthma and chronic obstructive pulmonary disease as well as several interventions for cervical, breast, colorectal, liver and childhood cancer, and the comprehensive treatment of cancer for those living with HIV. “SIDS in the Americas remain overwhelmingly vulnerable to NCDs. This Ministerial Conference comes at a unique time and will be key to amplifying the voice and needs of SIDS, bringing NCDs and mental health to the forefront of our priority list,” said Dr Jarbas Barbosa, PAHO Director, and WHO Regional Director for the Americas. “To build on this momentum, we must act now. PAHO is ready to support accelerated implementation of interventions in our region, including mainstreaming care for these conditions into primary health services and taking advantage of innovations such as digital health tools.” SIDS countries have a track record of driving global decision-making; their Port of Spain and SAMOA pathway agreements paved the way for the first-ever UN political declaration on NCDs in 2018. The conference and the Declaration will inform and shape forthcoming UN General Assembly High-Level Meetings on universal health coverage in September 2023 and on NCDs in 2025.
translations.reference: A matsayin wani ɓangare na amincewa da sanarwar, SIDS ta sanya hannu don gudanar da ayyuka daban-daban, waɗanda suka shafi fannoni kamar haɗar da al'umma gabaɗaya, haɓaka aiwatarwa, tabbatar da saka hannun jari, daidaitawa tsakanin gwamnatoci da lissafin ci gaba. Taron ya kuma nuna takamaiman alƙawurra na SIDS akan NCDs da lafiyar ƙwaƙwalwa, gami da inganta samun damar kula da lafiyar ƙwaƙwalwa a wuraren kulawa na farko, sabunta dokokin sarrafa taba don rufe sigari da vaping, da rage yawan cin gishiri da sukari. Waɗannan alƙawuran sun yi daidai da mafi kyawun tsarin WHO masu sauƙin kuɗi, abubuwan da suka dogara da shaida don magance NCDs. A baya-bayan nan, an sabunta jerin mafiya kyawun sayayya a Majalisar Kiwon Lafiya ta Duniya a watan Mayu don haɗe ƙananan rigakafi ta cutar rheumatism, cikakkiyar kulawa da cutar numfashi mai tsanani da tsawo, cututtukan huhu, da kuma cututtukan kansar mahaifa, nono, colorectal, hanta da ciwon daji na yara, da kuma cikakken maganin cutar kansa ga masu ɗauke da cutar HIV. "SIDS a ƙasashen nahiyar Amurka na cigaba da zama masu rauni sosai ga NCDs. Wannan taron na ministoci ya zo a lokaci na musamman, kuma zai zama mabuɗi don ci gaba da tattaunawa, dangane matsalar (mutuwa ta fuju'a) SIDS, da kuma bayyana matsalar (cututtuka marasa yaɗuwa) NCDs, da matsalar (lafiyar ƙwaƙwalwa ) a sahun gaba cikin jerin muhimman abubuwan tattaunwa, in ji Dr Jarbas Barbosa, Daraktan ( ƙungiyar lafiya ta Amurka)PAHO, kuma Daraktan (ƙungiyar likitoci ta duniya yankin Amurka) WHO. Domin tabbatar wannan yunƙurin, dole ne mu yi ƙoƙari yanzu. PAHO (ƙungiyar lafiya ta Amurka) a shirye take don tallafawa aiwatar da ayyukan gaggawa a yankinmu, gami da kula da waɗannan yanayi cikin ayyukan kiwon lafiya a ƙaramin mataki, da kuma cin gajiyar abubuwan bunƙasawa, kamar kayan aikin kiwon lafiya na na'ura. Ƙasashe masu fama da (mutuwar fuju'a) SIDS sun yi nasarar yanke shawara ta duniya; a nan ne birnin Spain (Port of Spain) da yankin ( SAMOA )suka shimfida yarjejeniya, wacce ta ba da damar yin sanarwar duniya a Karo na farko, dangane da cututtuka marasa yaduwa, (NCDs) a shekara ta 2018. Taron na ƙarawa juna sani, da sanarwar da ta gabata; za su haska babban taron majalisar Ɗinkin duniya da ke tafe, kan batun kiwon lafiyar duniya a watan Satumba na 2023 da kuma kan cututtuka marasa yaɗuwa (NCDs) a shekara ta 2025.

translations.source: WHO’s Global Neglected Tropical Diseases Programme Partners’ Meeting ends with stirring call for worldwide action Delegates and representatives left the Global Neglected Tropical Diseases Programme Partners’ Meeting with a stirring call to action from its director Dr Ibrahima Socé Fall. As the multinational meeting, attended by some 300 key partners, came to an end in Geneva on Tuesday 13 June, Dr Fall urged participants to take on board the message that, “if we do not challenge ourselves, we cannot evolve and improve”. In a wide-ranging event held to review progress against the WHO road map for neglected tropical diseases 2021–2030 and generate a better understanding of global NTD operations from both disease-specific and cross-cutting perspectives, partners, donors, technical partners, institutions and country representatives reinforced their commitment to achieving an ambitious target: a world free from neglected tropical diseases by 2030. The meeting’s primary theme centred around the vision of “One community delivering one Global NTD Programme”. Taking their cues from the three key strategic shifts advocated in the road map – greater country ownership, measuring impacts not process, and a commitment to cross-cutting activities and collaboration for greater efficiency – discussions were pragmatic, clear-sighted and suffused also with the need for health equity and justice to tackle NTDs. Only such an approach, the meeting heard, can bring about the change that is needed by some of the world’s poorest communities to achieve the United Nations 2030 Sustainable Development Goals. In the first such global meeting since the launch of the road map in January 2021, delegates heard also from WHO Director-General Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. Welcoming participants at the beginning of the two-day symposium, Dr Tedros said, “This gathering illustrates what WHO is all about – partners coming together to leverage their collective strength to address global health challenges that none of us could address alone. “A multifaceted challenge like neglected tropical diseases takes a multifaceted approach, and that is what we bring, together”.
translations.reference: Tattaunawar ƙungiyar ma'aikatan lafiya na duniya, na ma'abota shirin nazarin cututtukan yankuna masu fama da zafin Rana wa'yanda a kayi sake; ya ƙare da kiran ɗaukar mataki a fadin duniya. Jama'a da wakilai sun bar wajen shirin da aka yi na abokan hulɗar nazarin cututtukan yankuna masu fama da zafin rana; tare da kiran mayar da hankali wajen ɗaukar mataki daga darektanta Dr Ibrahima SocÃ Fall. Yayin da taron kasa da kasa, wanda ya samu halartar wasu manyan abokan hulɗa 300, ya samu ƙarƙarewa a Geneva a ranar Talata 13 ga watan Yuni, Dr Fall ya bukaci mahalarta taron da su dauki sakon cewa, idan ba mu kalubalanci kanmu ba, ba za mu iya ingantawa ba ko Cigaba. A cikin wani babban taron da aka gudanar don nazarin ci gaban (ƙungiyar likitoci ta duniya) WHO, a tsare - tsarenta don kula da cututtukan yankuna masu fama da zafin rana a 2021- 2030, da samar da kyakkyawar fahimta game da ayyukan ( cututtuka marasa yaɗuwa )NTD na duniya daga ƙayyadaddun cututtuka da kuma hangen gaba, abokan tarayya, masu ba da gudummawa, abokan fasaha, cibiyoyi da wakilan ƙasa; sun ƙarfafa himmarsu don cimma manufa mai fa'ida: a hasashen duniya Na kubuta daga cututtuka marasa yaɗuwa a yankunan masu fama da zafin rana a shekara ta 2030. Jigon taron ya tattara ne akan Samar da al'umma guda, wajen gudanar da shirin NTD na duniya bai ɗaya. Ta hanyar daukar bayanai masu mahimmanci guda, Wanda ya assasa tsarin mallakar nagartacciyar kasa, wajen auna cigaba ba hanyoyinsa ba, da jajircewa na al'amura , da haɗin gwiwa domin tabbatar da nuna kwarewa, abubuwan da aka tattauna an gudanar dasu a aikace , a bayyane kuma an yaɗata tare da buƙatar daidaito da adalci a harkar kiwon lafiya, domin daƙile matsalar NTDs. Irin wannan tsarin ne kawai, in ji taron, zai iya samar da sauyin da wasu al'ummomin duniya mafi talauci ke buƙata domin cimma muradun ci gaba mai dorewa na Majalisar ɗinkin Duniya a shekarar 2030. A cikin irin wannan taron na farko na duniya tun bayan ƙaddamar da tsarin a watan Janairun 2021, wakilai kuma sun ji ta bakin daraktan WHO - Janar Dr tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. Da yake maraba da mahalarta farkon taron na kwanaki biyu, Dr tedros ya ce, wannan taron ya bayya komai game da WHO, abokan hadin gwiwa da ke haduwa don yin amfani da karfin hadin gwiwarsu don magance kalubalen kiwon lafiyar duniya wanda babu daya daga cikimmu da zai iya magancewa shi kadai. Kalubale iri-iri kamar cututtukan yankuna masu fama zafi rana, da aka yi sake da su, kuma shi ne abin da muka kawo tare.

translations.source: Delegates and participants spent the subsequent two days identifying the major gaps and challenges to achieving high-level goals and local, on-the-ground challenges. Those on-the-ground challenges include ensuring that people directly affected by NTDs, and those directly responsible for administering interventions against NTDs, are solicited and acknowledged, particularly in terms of communication and community engagement. The meeting noted also the importance of developing communities of practice, in order to build the capacity and confidence of the global NTD workforce. In further discussions, delegates agreed on principles and practical steps to implement action towards the stated targets and planned together for a Global Action Plan for 2025–2030. Key actions and decisions arising from the meeting included recommendations for strengthening and operationalizing national coordination platforms to ensure coordination for joint planning and for monitoring and evaluation, and to ensure more efficient supply chain management within national systems. The Partners’ Meeting took place also at the end of a major functional review process within WHO’s Department of Control of Neglected Tropical Diseases. Over the course of the past four months, WHO has been hearing contributions and testimony from all its partners and stakeholders, in order to ensure that it itself embodies the values of accountability, transparency and equity that it espouses and demands. Those values also include ensuring that NTDs are repositioned in the global health architecture. Meeting participants welcomed the emphasis on the key roles that the NTD community can and must play in contributing to wider challenges such as Universal Health Coverage, One Health and the increasing threat of global climate change. Delegates attending in person were also able to enjoy an exhibition dedicated to neglected tropical diseases at WHO headquarters.
translations.reference: Wakilai da mahalarta taron sun shafe kwanaki biyu, suna bankaɗo manyan giɓina da ƙalubalen cimma manyan burika da kuma ƙalubale na gida. Waɗanda ke fuskantar ƙalubalen ƙasa da suka haɗa da mutanen da abin ya shafesu kaitsaye, dangane da NTDs da waɗanda ke da alhakin gudanar da ayyukan magance NTDa, an nemi su yarda, musamman ta fuskar sadarwa da haɗin gwiwar al'umma. Taron ya kuma lura da mahimmancin haɓaka al'ummomi masu kokari, don haɓaka iyawa da kwarin gwiwa da amincewar ma'aikatan NTD na duniya. A ci gaba da tattaunawa, wakilai sun amince da ka'idoji da matakai masu amfani don aiwatar da ayyuka zuwa ga maƙasudan da ake so a cimma, tare da tsarawa Bai ɗaya, domin ɗaukar mataki na duniya na 2025-2030. Muhimman matakai da yanke shawarwari a taron sun haɗa da shawarwari don ƙarfafawa da aiwatar da haɗin gwiwar amfani da kafafen sadarwa na zamani, don tabbatar da haɗin kai don cigaba da tsare - tsare, wajen lura da rairayewa, da kuma tabbatar da ingantaccen tsarin sarrafa kayan aiki a cikin tsarin kasa. Taron abokan hulɗar ya gudana kuma a ƙarshen babban aikin bita a cikin Sashen Kula da Cututtukan yankuna masu fama da zafin rana na WHO. A cikin watanni hudu da suka gabata, WHO tana jin gudumawa da shaida daga dukkan abokan hulɗarta da masu ruwa da tsaki, domin tabbatar da cewa ita kanta ta kunshi dabi’un rikon amana da gaskiya da daidaito,wanda ta yadda da kuma buƙata. Waɗannan abubuwa masu ƙima sun haɗa da tabbatar da cewa an bunƙasa NTDs a cikin tsare - tsaren cigaban kiwon lafiya na duniya. Mahalarta taron sun yi maraba da abin lura kan muhimman ayyukan da al'ummar NTD za su iya, kuma dole ne su bada gudummuwa ga manya - manyan kalubale, gamayyar harkar Lafiya ta Duniya, harkar lafiya ta Bai ɗaya, ƙaro ƙoƙarin magance barazanar sauyin yanayi a duniya. Wakilan da suka halarta kai tsaye sun sami damar jin daɗin wani baje kolin da aka keɓe don kula da cututtuka na yankuna masu fama da zafin rana a hedikwatar WHO.

translations.source: Global Neglected Tropical Diseases Programme Partners’ Meeting, 12–13 June 2023 Representatives of the global NTD community will gather in Geneva next week to participate in the Global Neglected Tropical Diseases Programme Partners’ Meeting, which takes place in headquarters’ auditorium on 12-13 June 2023. The objectives of the meeting are to review progress on the WHO road map for neglected tropical diseases 2021–2030 and generate a better understanding of global NTD operations from both disease-specific and cross-cutting perspectives, as well as to engage in wide-ranging discussions around the vision for One WHO delivering on one Global NTD Programme. While previous global meetings of NTD partners were convened by WHO in 2007 and 2017, this third upcoming event is the first since the launch of the road map in January 2021. The WHO road map for neglected tropical diseases 2021–2030 is a comprehensive framework that outlines targets, mechanisms for alignment with the Sustainable Development Goals and other global agendas and calls for strategic shifts in NTD approaches with the aim of ending the epidemic of neglected tropical diseases by 2030. The meeting will focus on: reviewing current progress to achieving the 2030 targets; identifying the major gaps and challenges to reaching those targets; agreeing principles and practical steps for how to implement action towards the targets; galvanizing support and commitment from NTD partners to operationalize the shifts advocated in the road map and to achieve its targets; and
translations.reference: Taron Abokan nazarin Cututtukan yankuna masu fama da zafin rana na Duniya wadaanda aka yi sake (NTDs), 12 - 13 ga watan Yuni 2023 . Wakilan al'ummar NTD na duniya za su hallara a Geneva mako mai zuwa don cuɗanya a cikin shirin (NTDs), wanda ke gudana a ɗakin taron hedikwatar, a 12-13 Yuni 2023. Makasudin taron shi ne duba ci gaba akan tsare - tsaren WHO don kula da cututtuka na yankuna masu fama da zafin rana 2021- 2030 da samar da kyakkyawar fahimta game da ayyukan NTD na duniya daga dukkanin ainihin cututtuka, da ra'ayoyi daban-daban, da kuma tattaunawa mai yawa dangane da hangen nesa wajwn gudanarwar WHO Na bai ɗaya, na s hirin ( NTD). Yayin da taron duniya da ya gabata na abokan huldar NTD, an tattauna da WHO a 2007 da 2017, wannan taron na uku da ke tafe shi ne na farko tun bayan kaddamar da sababbin tsare - tsare a cikin Janairu na 2021. Tsare -tsaren WHO don kula da cututtukan yankuna masu fama zafin rana 2021 - 2030 wani tsari ne mai mahimmanci wanda ke bayyana manifofi, hanyoyin tsara dabaru tare da Manufofin Ci gaba mai dorewa, da sauran ajandoji na duniya, an kuma yin kira dangane da cigaban NTD Na nan gaba, tare da da nufin kawo karshen annobar cututtukan yankuna masu fama da zafin rana nan da shekarar 2030. Tattaunawar za ta ta'allaka ne a kan: duba irin ci gaban da aka samu a yanzu don cimma muradun 2030; gano manyan giɓina da ƙalubalen da ake fuskanta wajen cimma waɗancan maƙasudan; yarda da ka'idoji da matakai masu amfani don yadda za a aiwatar da ayyuka don cimma manufa; tallafawa goyon baya da sadaukarwa daga abokan hulɗar NTD don aiwatar da canjin shawarwarin da aka bayar a tsare - tsare, don cimma burika ; da kuma

**Translation:**

Taron Kungiyar Kokan Cututtukan Tropical da Aka Makantar (Neglected Tropical Diseases - NTDs), 12 – 13 Yuni 2023

Wakilan al'ummar duniya da ke da dangantaka da NTDs za su taro a Geneva a makon nan zuwa taron Kungiyar Kokan Cututtukan Tropical da Aka Makantar, wanda zai gudana a fadar hedkwatar a ranakun 12-13 Yuni 2023.

Makamu na taron su ne a duba ci gaban da aka samu a bisa ga hanyar sadarwa ta WHO (WHO roadmap) don cututtukan tropical da aka makantar 2021–2030, da kuma bunkasar fahimtar yadda ake aiwatar da ayyukan NTD a duniya daga dukkanin rawarin lafiya ta musamman da ta dacewa da dukkanin ayyuka, da kuma shiga cikin tattaunawa mai karfi kan hangen nesa na WHO daya da ke aiwatar da Kungiyar NTD daya a duniya.

A da, taron duniya na kungiyar abokan gaba da NTDs an shirya shi ne a shekarar 2007 da 2017 ta WHO, wannan taron na uku da zai zo, shi ne karo na farko tun bayan fitar da hanyar sadarwa a Janairu 2021.

Hanyar sadarwa ta WHO don cututtukan tropical da aka makantar 2021–2030, ita ce kyakkyawan tsari da ke bayanin abubuwan da za a kai, hanyoyin da za a bi don daidaita da Malaman Ci Gaban Kula da Abubuwan Duniya (Sustainable Development Goals) da sauran ayyukan duniya, da kuma kiran canje-canje na ilimi a hanyoyin NTD da nufin kawar da cutar NTDs zuwa shekarar 2030.

translations.source: planning together for a Global Action Plan 2025–2030. Over 300 participants in the meeting are expected to attend, either in-person or online. They will include representatives of the global NTD community, from countries and donors to implementing and technical partners, from academia to patients’ associations and all other entities and institutions involved in the fight against NTDs. An exhibition on neglected tropical diseases will take place in the mezzanine of the B building, just above the cafeteria. A set of metal panels will illustrate the 20 conditions grouped under the NTD umbrella and provide information on actions implemented to tackle their burden.

Za su hada da wakilan al'ummar NTD na duniya, daga kasashe da masu ba da gudummawa ga aiwatarwa da abokan aikin fasaha. translations.source: WHO announces winners of the 4th Health for All Film Festival 7 winning short films, 4 special mentions from the jury The World Health Organization has announced the official selection of this year’s winning films at its 4th Annual Health for All Film Festival, held at WHO Headquarters, Geneva. The event, attended in person and online by actors, producers and public figures, saw winning films announced for 7 different categories, while 4 films received special mentions from the jury. This is the fourth year of the film festival and competition was no less fierce, with some 93 shortlisted films covering issues ranging from anxiety and depression through to the effects of climate change on health, as well as the health challenges of people with disabilities. The films were judged by a panel of distinguished professionals, artists and activists, including the renown actors, Sharon Stone and Alfonso Herrera, dance choreographer, Sherrie Silver, climate activist, Sophia Kianni and media personality, Adelle Onyango. They were joined by senior United Nations officials and WHO staff. “The Health for All Film Festival brings a human face to WHO’s scientific work,” said WHO Director-General, Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. “Listening to the voices of people affected by health issues is a powerful way to raise awareness and improve our understanding of people’s experiences and this can help us advance towards health for all.”
translations.reference: WHO ta sanar da waɗanda suka yi nasara a bikin Kiwon Lafiya na 4 na Dukan Fina-Finai 7 sun lashe na gajerun fina-finai, ambaton 4 na musamman daga rukuni Na musamman ƙungiyar likitoci ta Duniya ta sanar da zaɓin zaɓaɓɓu na wannan shekarar, na gasar fina - finai , a taronta na kiwon lafiya na 4 ga dukkanin tarukan ingancin fina - finai da yake gudana a hedikwatar WHO , Geneva. taron wanda ’yan wasa da furodusoshi da manyan jama’a suka halarta Ido da Ido da kuma ta kafar sadarwa, an bayyana fina-finan da suka samu nasara a sassa daban-daban guda 7, yayin da fina-finai 4 suka sami ambato na musamman daga alƙalan gasa. Wannan ita ce shekara ta hudu ta gudanar da bikin fim, kuma gasar ba ta yi kasa a gwiwa ba, inda wasu fina-finai 93 da aka tantance waɗanda suka kunshi batutuwan da suka hada da damuwa da ƙunci a sakamakon tasirin sauyin yanayi a harkar lafiya, da kuma kalubalen kiwon lafiyar nakasassu. Wasu gungun kwararrun masana, masu fasaha da masu fafutuka ne suka tantance fina-finan, ciki har da fitattun 'yan wasan kwaikwayo, Sharon Stone da kuma Alfonso herrera, mawaƙin rawa, sherri silver, mai fafutukar Lura da sauyin, sophia kianni da cikakken ɗan media, adelle onyango. Sun hade da manyan jami'o'i da ma'aikatan kungiyar likitoci ta duniya. Taron ingancin fina-finai ya yi Jan hankali ga WHO, cewar daraktan daraktoci na WHO, Dr Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. Sauraron muryoyin mutanen da al'amurran kiwon lafiya suka shafa dangane da matsalolin harkar lafiya, wata hanya ce mai karfi don wayar da kan jama'a da inganta fahimtarmu game da abubuwan da mutane ke fuskanta, kuma wannan zai iya taimaka mana mu bunƙasa kiwon lafiya zuwa gaba.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's the Hausa translation of the provided document. I've aimed for accuracy and natural-sounding Hausa, keeping in mind the context of a formal announcement.  I've included some notes after the translation explaining some choices I made.

**WHO ta bayyana waduncin nasara a gasar fina-finan 'Kuliya ga Dukkan Mutane' na shekarar ta 4 - Fina-finan gajere 7 sun yi nasara, 4 kuma an yi musu bayanin musamman daga kwamitin sherran.**

Kungiyar Kuliya ta Duniya (WHO) ta bayyana jerin fina-finan da suka yi nasara a gasar 'Kuliya ga Dukkan Mutane' ta shekarar ta 4, wacce aka yi a hedkwatar WHO, Geneva. Taron, da yawancin masoyan fina-finai, prodyuserai, da manyan mutane suka halarta, bisa ga hanyoyin da suka gabata, an bayyana fina-finan da suka yi nasara a fannin rassa daddashi 7, yayin da fina-finai 4 aka ba su bayanin musamman daga kwamitin sherran.

Wannan shine shekarar ta hudu da aka yi gasar fina-finan, kuma adawa ta fi kasala, da fina-finai kusan 93 suka samu damar shiga jerin, suna magana akan batõ-batõ daban-daban, daga damuwa da cutar tahuche zuwa tasirin canjin yanayi akan kuliya, da kuma matsalolin kuliya da mutanen da ke da cikas suka fuskanta.

Kwamitin sherran sun duba fina-finan ne ta hanyar kungiyar masana, masu fasaha, da masu kokari, ciki har da manyan masoyan fina-finai, Sharon Stone da Alfonso Herrera, mai tsara rawa Sherrie Silver, mai adawa da canjin yanayi Sophia Kianni, da kuma jaridar Adelle Onyango.  An haɗa su da babban jami'an Majalisar Dinkin Duniya da ma'aikatan WHO.

“Gasar fina-finan ‘Kuliya ga Dukkan Mutane’ na nuna fuskar mutane a aikin kimiyya na WHO,” in ji Babban Daraktan WHO, Dr. Tedros Adhanom Ghebreyesus. “Sõarin muryõr mutanen da suka shafi matsalolin kuliya, harka ne mai karfi don ƙara wayar da kan jama'a da kuma ƙara fahimtar mu akan abubuwan da mutane ke fuskanta, kuma hakan na iya taimaka mana wajen ƙara gaggawa zuwa kuliya ga dukkan mutane.”

---

**Notes on Translation Choices:**

*   **"Health for All Film Festival"**: I translated this as "Gasar fina-finan 'Kuliya ga Dukkan Mutane'" which literally means "Film Festival of Health to All People."  This is a common way to translate titles like this into Hausa.
*   **Formal Language:** I used a relatively formal tone, appropriate for an official announcement from the WHO.
*   **"Shortlisted"**: Translated as "suka samu damar shiga jerin" (they were able to enter the list).
*   **Names:** I kept the names Sharon Stone, Alfonso Herrera, Sherrie Silver, Sophia Kianni, and Adelle Onyango as they are, as is standard practice.
*   **"Director-General"**: Translated as "Babban Daraktan" (Chief Director).
*   **"Awareness"**: Translated as "wayar da kan jama'a" (informing the public).
*   **"Advance towards"**: Translated as "ƙara gaggawa zuwa" (accelerate towards).
*   **"Cikas"**: Used to describe disabilities.

**Important Considerations:**

*   **Context is Key:**  This translation is based on the provided text. If there's a specific audience or purpose for the translation, adjustments might be needed.
*   **Review by a Native Speaker:** Ideally, a native Hausa speaker with experience in medical or public health terminology should review the translation for accuracy and fluency.
*   **Dialect:** Hausa has different dialects. This translation aims for a standard, widely understood form.

translations.source: From the official selection one “GRAND PRIX” is attributed for each of the three main competition categories: Universal Health Coverage, Health emergencies, and Better health and well-being, which align with WHO’s Triple Billion Targets. Sharon Stone, Golden Globe and Emmy Award-winning actress from the United States of America, producer and activist for health and humanitarian causes said: "I am delighted to be part of the Health for All Film Festival. This is about creating better awareness on crucial actions needed for reaching healthier living conditions around the world. The stories selected talk to us about the intrinsic value of good health and its access, and they advocate for universal health coverage. Universal Health Coverage is a very important right, it’s a human right for everyone around the world. "Four special prizes were also given for a Student-produced film, a film on Climate Change and Health, a film on Sexual and Reproductive Health and Rights and a Very Short Film. The theme of mental health featured heavily in this year’s winning entries, including a powerful and moving short film from Sweden about anxiety and depression. The film, set to a stirring soundtrack, featured a series of actors expressing different stages of anxiety and how it can manifest itself. The overall message was that you are not alone in experiencing negative thoughts and that it is okay to acknowledge such feelings.Another winning film, from Bangladesh, features a young boy who was exposed to lead from a local factory.
translations.reference: Daga zaɓin alƙalan gasar , ɗayan 'yan gasar ana danganta shi ga ɗaya daga cikin ukun ɓangarorin gasar: Masu gamayyar kiwon Lafiya ta Duniya, Masu Lura da sashen tallafin gaggawa, masu Lura da Ingancin kiwon lafiya da walwala, waɗanda suka sanarwa da WHO biliyan uku wanda ake nema. Sharon Stone, Golden Globe da Emmy masu lashe lambar yabo ta 'yan gasa daga Amurka, furodusa kuma mai fafutukar kiwon lafiya da harkokin jin ƙai ya ce: "Na yi farin cikin kasancewa cikin bikin ingancin Fina-finai. Wannan ya kasance ne don samar da wayewa me kyau ,a Mahimman ƙoƙarin da ake buƙata don samun ingantaccen yanayi Na lafiya a duniya,. labarun da aka zaɓa suna magana da mu game da ainihin ƙimar lafiya da samun damarta, kuma suna ba da shawarar samar da gamayyar lafiya ta Duniya. Gamayyar kiwon lafiya ta duniya hakki ne mai matuƙar mahimmanci, haƙƙin ɗan adam ne ga kowa da kowa a duniya. An kuma bayar da kyautuka na musamman guda hudu na fim din da dalibai suka shirya a kan sauyin yanayi da lafiya, da fim kan lafiyar jima'i da haifuwa da hakkoki da kuma gajeren fim. Taken lafiyar kwakwalwa ya fito sosai a cikin shigarwar nasara ta wannan shekara, gami da gajerun fim mai ƙarfi da motsi daga mutanen ƙasar Sweden game da damuwa da baƙin ciki. Fim ɗin, wanda aka tsara da sauti mai ban sha'awa, ya ƙunshi jerin 'yan wasan kwaikwayo da ke bayyana matakan damuwa daban-daban da kuma yadda zai iya bayyana kansa. Gabaɗayan saƙon shi ne cewa ba kai kaɗai bane ke fuskantar munanan tunani kuma yana da kyau a gane irin wannan tunanin. Wani fim ɗin da aka yi nasara, daga ƙasar Bangladash, ya nuna wani yaro matashi da aka bayyana da jagoran wata masana'anta.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's the Hausa translation of the provided text, aiming for accuracy and natural flow. I've included some notes after the translation to explain some choices I made.

**Hausa Translation:**

Daga zaɓuɓɓukan da aka zaba, an ba da "KYAUTA TA MANYAN DARAJAR" daya a kowace daga manyan rukuni uku na gasa: Kwarewar Lafiya ta Kula da Kowa, Matsalolin Daƙiƙiyar Lafiya, da Babban Lafiya da Kasancewa Mai Lafiya, waɗanda ke da alaka da Burin Trililiyar WHO.  Sharon Stone, gwarzo mai kyautatawa a fina-finai da lamban yabo ta Golden Globe da Emmy daga Amurka, mai gabatar da fina-finai kuma mai kasancewa a kan al'amuran lafiya da jin dadin mutane, ta ce: "Ina farin ciki sosai na kasancewa wani bangare na Babban Taron Fina-finai na Lafiya ga Kowa.  Wannan ya kasance ne don ƙara wayar da kan jama'a akan ayyukan da suka fi kipa don cimma yanayi mai kyau na rayuwa a duniya.  Ƙoƙin da aka zaba sun gaya mana game da darajar gaskiya na lafiya mai kyau da samun damar samun ta, kuma suna dafataccen kwarewar lafiya ta kula da kowa. Kwarewar Lafiya ta Kula da Kowa ita ce haƙin muhimmin sosai, haƙin ɗan-adam ne ga kowa a duniya."  An kuma ba da kyautukan musamman huɗu don fina-finai da ƙwararren ɗalibi ya shirya, fina-finai akan Canjin Muhimmi da Lafiya, fina-finai akan Lafiya da Haƙƙin Jinsin Mata da Haƙƙin Ilimi, da kuma Fina-finai na Kananan Tsire-Tsire.  Mai da hankali kan lafiyar zuciya ya bayyana sosai a cikin fina-finai da suka yi nasara a wannan shekara, gami da fina-finan gajere mai ƙarfi da zai iya motsa rai daga Sweden game da damuwa da rashin lafiya. Fina-finan, da ke da waƙa mai ban mamaki, ya nuna jeri na masoyan da ke nuni da matakan damuwa da yadda ta iya bayyana.  Sakamakon gaba ɗaya shine cewa ba ka daɗa a cikin tunanin rashin lafiya kuma yana da kyau a amsa irin wannan zama.  Wani fina-finan da ya yi nasara, daga Bangladesh, ya nuna yaro mai shekaru da aka haɗa shi da iskarin kananan abubuwan daga masana'antar gida.

**Notes on Translation Choices:**

*   **"GRAND PRIX"**: I've kept it as "KYAUTA TA MANYAN DARAJAR" which is a common and understandable way to refer to a Grand Prix in Hausa.
*   **WHO’s Triple Billion Targets**: Translated as "Burin Trililiyar WHO" (WHO's Trillion Targets). This is a direct translation and should be clear.
*   **"Health for All Film Festival"**: Translated as "Babban Taron Fina-finai na Lafiya ga Kowa." This is a standard way to express this concept.
*   **"Universal Health Coverage"**: Translated as "Kwarewar Lafiya ta Kula da Kowa." This is the established Hausa term for Universal Health Coverage.
*   **"Human Right"**: Translated as "haƙin ɗan-adam" - standard Hausa for human right.
*   **"Climate Change and Health"**: Translated as "Canjin Muhimmi da Lafiya."
*   **"Sexual and Reproductive Health and Rights"**: Translated as "Lafiya da Haƙƙin Jinsin Mata da Haƙƙin Ilimi."
*   **"Anxiety and Depression"**: Translated as "damuwa da rashin lafiya."
*   **"Stirring Soundtrack"**: Translated as "waƙa mai ban mamaki" - conveys the emotional impact.
*   **"You are not alone"**: Translated as "ba ka daɗa" - a common expression for reassurance.
*   **"Lead from a local factory"**: Translated as "iskarin kananan abubuwan daga masana'antar gida."

**Important Considerations for Low-Resource Languages:**

*   **Context is Key:**  Hausa has regional variations. This translation aims for a generally understandable form.
*   **Terminology:**  For specialized topics like health, new terminology might need to be created or adapted.  This translation uses established terms where possible.
*   **Review by a Native Speaker:**  Ideally, a native Hausa speaker, especially one familiar with health and film terminology, should review this translation for accuracy and naturalness.

translations.source: Basic energy access lags amid renewable opportunities, new report shows Global energy access gap persists: 675 million people without electricity, 2.3 billion people reliant on harmful cooking fuels A new report by the International Energy Agency (IEA), the International Renewable Energy Agency (IRENA), the United Nations Statistics Division (UNSD), the World Bank, and the World Health Organization (WHO), released today, finds that the world is not on track to achieve the Sustainable Development Goal (SDG) 7 for energy by 2030. This year marks the halfway point for achieving SDGs by 2030. SDG 7 is to ensure access to affordable, reliable, sustainable and modern energy. The goal includes reaching universal access to electricity and clean cooking, doubling historic levels of efficiency improvements, and substantially increasing the share of renewables in the global energy mix. Attaining this goal will have a deep impact on people’s health and well-being, helping to protect them from environmental and social risks such as air pollution, and expanding access to primary health care and services. The 2023 edition of Tracking SDG 7: The Energy Progress Report warns that current efforts are not enough to achieve the SDG 7 on time. There has been some progress on specific elements of the SDG 7 agenda – for example, the increased rate of using renewables in the power sector – but progress is insufficient to reach the targets set forth in the SDGs. The global energy crisis is expected to stimulate the deployment of renewables and improve energy efficiency with several government policies pointing to increasing investment.
translations.reference: Samun makamashi na asali yana da alaƙa a tsakanin damar sabuntawa, sabon rahoton ya nuna An ci gaba da samun gibin samun wutar lantarki a duniya: Mutane miliyan 675 ba su da wutar lantarki, mutane biliyan 2.3 sun dogara da abubuwan girki masu ɗumama. Wani sabon rahoton da hukumar kula da ikon ƙasa da ƙasa (IEA), da hukumar sabunta ikon ƙasa da ƙasa (IRENA), da hukumar kididdiga ta majalisar dinkin duniya (UNSD) da bankin duniya, da hukumar lafiya ta duniya (WHO), suka fitar a yau, ya nuna cewa duniya bata kan hanyar cimma burin ci gaba mai dorewa (SDG) 7 don samun iko nan da 2030. A wannan shekara ta nuna rabin lokaci don cimma SDGs nan da 2030. SDG 7 shi ne tabbatar da samun dama Kai tsaye,, abin dogaro, da dorewa da iko na zamani. Makasudin ya hada da isar da damar samun wutar lantarki da dafa abinci mai tsafta, ninka matakan inganta ingantaccen aiki na tarihi, da kara yawan kason abubuwan da za a iya sabuntawa a cikin hadakar samun iko na duniya. Cimma wannan buri zai yi tasiri mai zurfi ga lafiyar mutane da walwala, yana taimakawa wajen kare su daga hatsarori na muhalli da zamantakewa kamar gurɓataccen iska, da faɗaɗa hanyoyin samun kulawa da kiwon lafiya na farko da ayyuka. Bibiyar gyaran 2023 SDG 7: bunƙasar samun iko ya bayyana rahoton kashedin cewa ƙoƙarin da ake yi yanzu bai isa ba don cimma SDG 7 akan lokaci. An sami ɗan ci gaba kan taƙamaiman abubuwa na ajandar SDG 7 - alal misali, ƙaruwar yawan amfani da abubuwan sabuntawa a fannin wutar lantarki - amma ci gaban bai isa ba don cimma manufofin da aka tsara a cikin SDGs. Ana sa ran rikicin samun makamashi na duniya zai haifar da tura abubuwan sabuntawa da ingantaccen iko tare da manufofin gwamnati da yawa da ke nuna karuwar saka hannun jari.
translations.hypothesis:
Okay, here's the Hausa translation of the provided document. I've aimed for clarity and accuracy, keeping in mind the context of energy access and development.  I've also included some notes after the translation to explain some choices I made.

**Translation (Hausa):**

Rundunar samar da makamin wuta na kan rawar jiki a tsakiyar dama da dama na damar samar da makamin wuta ta sabuntawa, rahoton sabo ya nuna.  Rashin isassun samar da makamin wuta a duniya na ci gaba: miliyan 675 ba su da wata hanya don samun wuta, miliyan 2.3 suna dogon dogon amsar kan abubuwan da ke cutar da jiki don gasar da abinci.

Wani rahoton da aka fitar a yau ne ta Kungiyar Kasuwancin Makamin Wuta ta Duniya (IEA), Kungiyar Makamin Wuta ta Sabuntawa ta Duniya (IRENA), Sashe na Ilimin Kimiyya na Majalisar Dinkin Duniya (UNSD), Bankin Duniya, da Kungiyar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO), ya gano cewa duniya ba ta kan hanyar cimma burin ci gaban kimiya mai mahimmanci (SDG) na 7 a shekarar 2030.  Shekarar nan na alama ce ta kusan rabi na cimma burin ci gaban kimiya mai mahimmanci a shekarar 2030.  SDG 7 na nufin tabbatar da samun isassun makamin wuta mai farin kaya, mai amincin, mai dorewa, da na zamani.  Burin ya haɗa da samun isassun wata hanya don samun wuta da gasar da abinci mai tsafta, duban matakin canjin yuwuwar tarihi, da ƙara yawan adadin makamin wuta ta sabuntawa a cikin juyin makamin wuta a duniya.  Cimma wannan burin zai yi tasiri mai zurfi akan lafiya da kyakkyawar rayuwar mutane, yana taimaka wa kariya daga haɗin gaske na muhittin da na zamantawa, irin su cutar da iska, da haɓaka samun kula da lafiya da ayyukan kula da lafiya.

Editan shekarar 2023 na Tracking SDG 7: The Energy Progress Report ya yi gargadi cewa ƙoƙarin da ake yi yanzu ba su isa don cimma SDG 7 a kan lokaci.  An samu wani ci gaba a kan wasu bangare na kundin SDG 7 – alalokacin, ƙarin yawan adadin amsar makamin wuta ta sabuntawa a fannin samar da wuta – amma ci gaba bai isa don cimma burin da aka kafa a kundin SDG.  An yi tsammani cewa matsalar makamin wuta a duniya za ta haɓaka amsar makamin wuta ta sabuntawa da ƙara yuwuwar samar da wuta, tare da ƙa'idodi da dama na gwamnati da ke nuni da ƙara saka hannun jari.

**Pronunciation Guide (Approximate - for those unfamiliar with Hausa):**

*   **Runduna:** Roo-n-doo-nah
*   **Samar:** Sah-mar
*   **Makamin wuta:** Mah-kah-meen woo-tah
*   **Sabuntawa:** Sah-boon-tah-wah
*   **IEA:** Ee-ay-ah
*   **IRENA:** Ee-ray-nah
*   **UNSD:** Oon-sed
*   **SDG:** Ess-dee-jee
*   **Kyakkyawar rayuwa:** Kyak-kyah-wah ray-oo-wah

**Notes on Translation Choices:**

*   **"Energy Access"**: I used "Samar da makamin wuta" which literally translates to "providing energy." It's a common and understandable phrase in Hausa for this concept.
*   **"Renewable Opportunities"**: Translated as "dama da dama na damar samar da makamin wuta ta sabuntawa" - meaning "opportunities for providing renewable energy."
*   **"Harmful Cooking Fuels"**: Translated as "abubuwan da ke cutar da jiki don gasar da abinci" - meaning "things that harm the body for cooking fuel."
*   **"Sustainable Development Goal (SDG)"**: I kept "SDG" as it's increasingly recognized internationally, but provided the full Hausa translation "burin ci gaban kimiya mai mahimmanci" the first time it was used.
*   **"Universal Access"**: Translated as "samun isassun wata hanya" - meaning "getting enough a way."
*   **"Energy Mix"**: Translated as "juyin makamin wuta" - meaning "energy rotation/combination."
*   **"Stimulate the deployment"**: Translated as "haɓaka amsar" - meaning "increase the response/deployment."
*   **"Government policies pointing to increasing investment"**: Translated as "ƙa'idodi da dama na gwamnati da ke nuni da ƙara saka hannun jari" - meaning "many government policies that point to increasing investment."

**Important Considerations:**

*   **Context is Key:** This translation is based on the provided text.  If the document is part of a larger project, there might be specific terminology preferences.
*   **Target Audience:**  The level of formality and technical language can be adjusted based on who will be reading the translation.
*   **Review by a Native Speaker:**  Ideally, a native Hausa speaker with experience in energy or development topics should review the translation for accuracy and naturalness.

translations.source: However, IRENA estimates show that international public financial flows in support of clean energy in low- and middle-income countries have been decreasing since before the COVID-19 pandemic and funding is limited to a small number of countries. To meet SDG 7 targets and to ensure that people fully benefit from the socio-economic gains of the shift to sustainable energy, it is necessary to structurally reform international public finance and define new opportunities to unlock investments. The report also finds that mounting debt and rising energy prices are worsening the outlook for reaching universal access to clean cooking and electricity. Current projections estimate that 1.9 billion people will be without clean cooking and 660 million without electricity access in 2030 if we do not take further action and continue with current efforts. These gaps will negatively impact the health of our most vulnerable populations and accelerate climate change. According to WHO, 3.2 million people die each year from illness caused by the use of polluting fuels and technologies, which increase exposure to toxic levels of household air pollution. Key findings of the report In 2010, 84% of the world’s population had access to electricity. This increased to 91% in 2021, meaning more than a billion people gained access over that period. However, the growth pace of access slowed in 2019–2021 compared to previous years.
translations.reference: Ko yaya, ƙididdigar IRENA ta nuna cewa kwararar kudaden jama'a na ƙasa da ƙasa don tallafawa na samar da cikakken makamash, a cikin ƙasashe masu karamin karfi da matsakaita, suna na raguwa tun kafin barkewar cutar ta COVID-19 kuma an taƙaita kudade ga kananan ƙasashe. Don cimma burin SDG ta 7 da kuma tabbatar da cewa mutane sun ci gajiyar ci gaban zamantakewa da tattalin arziƙin na canjin makamashi mai dorewa, ya zama dole a sake fasalin tsarin kuɗin jama'a na duniya da ayyana sabbin damammaki don buɗe hannun jari. Rahoton ya kuma nuna cewa karuwar basussuka da hauhawar farashin na kara tabarbare hasashe na ganin an kai ga samun tsaftataccen makamashin dafa abinci da wutar lantarki. Hasashen da aka yi a halin yanzu ya nuna cewa mutane biliyan 1.9 ba za su rasa girki mai tsafta ba sannan miliyan 660 ba za su samu wutar lantarki ba a shekarar 2030 idan ba mu dauki wani mataki ba kuma a ci gaba da kokarin da ake yi a yanzu. wadannan giɓinan za su yi mummunan tasiri ga lafiyar al'ummar mu masu rauni da kuma hanzarta canjin yanayi. A cewar WHO, mutane miliyan 3.2 ne ke mutuwa a kowace shekara sakamakon rashin lafiya da amfani da gurbataccen mai da fasahohin kirki ke haifarwa, wanda ke kara yawan kamuwa da gurɓacewar iska na gida. Mahimmin sakamakon rahoton A cikin 2010, kashi 84% na al'ummar duniya sun sami wutar lantarki a wancan lokacin. wannan ya karu zuwa 91% a cikin 2021, ma'ana fiye da mutane biliyan sun sami damar shiga cikin wannan lokacin. Ko yaya, saurin haɓakar damar shiga ya ragu a cikin 2019 - 2021 idan aka kwatanta da shekarun da suka gabata.

Don cimma burin SDG na 7 da kuma tabbatar da cewa mutane suna amshi amsa mai yawa daga samun fa'ida na zamantakewa da tattalin arziki daga canjin zuwa makamin dace, ya zama dole a gyara fasaloli na isar da kudin jama'a na duniya da kuma ƙirƙirar sababbin hanyoyin don buɗe saka-saka. Rahoton ya ƙara gano cewa ƙarin bashi da haɓaka farashin makami na haɓaka yanayin samun damar shiga makamin da ke da sauri da kuma wutan lantarki. An kiyasta cewa mutane biliyan 1.9 za su fita ba da samun makamin da ke da sauri a shekarar 2030, kuma miliyan 660 ba za su sami wutan lantarki ba idan muka ci gaba da aikatawa da kuma ci gaba da ƙoƙarin da muke yi yanzu. Babban abubuwan da aka gano a rahoton A shekarar 2010, kashi 84% na mutanen duniya sun sami damar shiga wutan lantarki. Wannan ya ƙara zuwa 91% a shekarar 2021, watau mutane fiye da biliyan ɗaya sun sami damar shiga a lokacin. translations.source: Rural electrification efforts contributed to this progress, but a large gap within urban areas remains. In 2021, 567 million people in sub-Saharan Africa did not have access to electricity, accounting for more than 80% of the global population without access. The access deficit in the region stayed almost the same as in 2010. The world remains off track to achieve universal access to clean cooking by 2030. Up to 2.3 billion people still use polluting fuels and technologies for cooking, largely in sub-Saharan Africa and Asia. The use of traditional biomass also means households spend up to 40 hours a week gathering firewood and cooking, which prohibits women from pursuing employment or participating in local decision-making bodies and children from going to school. According to the 2019 WHO estimates, 3.2 million premature deaths each year were attributable to household air pollution created by using polluting fuels and technologies for cooking. Renewable electricity use in global consumption has grown from 26.3% in 2019 to 28.2% in 2020, the largest single-year increase since the start of tracking progress for the SDGs. Efforts to increase renewables’ share in heating and transport, which represent more than three quarters of global energy consumption, remain off target to achieve 1.5oC climate objectives. Energy intensity – the measure of how much energy the global economy uses per dollar of GDP – improved from 2010–2020 by 1.8% annually.
translations.reference: YunƘurin samar da wutar lantarki a yankunan karkara ya taimaka wajen wannan ci gaba, amma akwai babban giɓi a cikin birane. A cikin shekarar 2021, mutane miliyan 567 a yankin Sahara ba su da wutar lantarki, wanda ya kai sama da kashi 80% na al'ummar duniya ba tare da samun wutar lantarki ba. Rashin isa ga yankin ya ƙasance kusan daidai da na shekarar 2010. Duniya ta ƙasance a kan hanya don samun damar dafa abinci mai tsafta nan da 2030. Kimanin mutane biliyan 2.3 har yanzu suna amfani da gurbataccen mai da fasahohin dafa abinci, galibi a yankin Sahara da Asiya. Amfani da biomas na gargajiya yana nufin gidaje suna kwashe sama da sa'o'i 40 a mako suna tattara itace da dafa abinci, wanda ke hana mata neman aikin yi ko shiga cikin ƙungiyoyin yanke shawara na gida da yara zuwa makaranta. Bisa kididdigar da WHO ta yi a shekarar 2019, mutane miliyan 3.2 ne ke mutuwa da wuri a kowace shekara sakamakon gurɓacewar iska da aka haifar ta hanyar amfani da gurbataccen mai da fasahohin dafa abinci. Amfani da wutar lantarki mai sabuntawa a cikin amfani da duniya ya karu daga 26.3% a cikin 2019 zuwa 28.2% a cikin 2020, haɓaka mafi girma na shekara guda tun farkon sa ido kan ci gaban SDGs. Ƙoƙarin haɓaka rabo mai sabuntawa a cikin dumama da sufuri, wanda ke wakiltar sama da kashi uku cikin huɗu na amfani da makamashi na duniya, ya ci gaba da ƙasancewa a kan manufa don cimma manufofin yanayi na 1.5o C. Ƙarfin makamashi - ma'aunin makamashi na yawan makamashin da tattalin arzikin duniya ke amfani da shi kowace dala na GDP" ya inganta daga 2010 "2020 da 1.8% a kowace shekara.
